---
title: Hardware
format: html
---

[Hydrophones](/content/hydrophones.qmd)

[Connecting to the ship's GPS](/content/GPS.qmd)

Connecting the depth sensor

-   NEFSC: this is plugging in the white USB cable to the computer

-   SEFSC:

-   PIFSC:

[How to figure out the depth sensor equation](/content/depth.qmd)
